name: SoFi
description_short: SoFi is a credit repair provider based in San Francisco, California. Rated 2.4/5 with 177 Google reviews, reflecting limited customer satisfaction.
description_long:
SoFi is a credit repair provider serving clients in San Francisco, California. With 177 Google reviews and a 2.4/5.0 rating, SoFi has built a significant presence in the local credit repair market.

Operating as a loan agency, financial planner, insurance agency, SoFi provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in San Francisco, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. SoFi operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the San Francisco, California area who are considering SoFi should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
